description_long: This house features a blend of traditional and modern architectural elements, with a two-story main structure and an attached single-story section. The exterior showcases a combination of light-colored walls, large windows, and a dark gable roof, complemented by a glass-enclosed sunroom or patio area. The property is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn, a wooden fence, and a cluster of mature trees, providing privacy and greenery. The front of the house includes a covered porch with columns and steps leading to the main entrance, while the backyard offers ample open space. The driveway and sidewalk connect the house to the street, enhancing accessibility. Overall, the design emphasizes comfort, openness, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A spacious two-story house with a mix of traditional and modern features, including a gable roof, large windows, a sunroom, and a landscaped yard with trees and fencing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch with columns, driveway, and a clear view of the sunroom and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard, wooden fence, and the open lawn area, with the house's rear and side windows visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, clusters of trees, and the back facade of the house, including the sunroom and patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side entrance, additional windows, and the transition between the house and the fenced yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and a sunroom
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, steps, and a prominent main door
